title: John Peyton
compiled_truth: John Peyton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-04 to 2001-06-01), John Peyton sent 12 and received 49 emails, totalling 61 interactions. Top correspondents: [Keith Macivor](people/keith-macivor) (8), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (8), [Jean Mrha](people/jean-mrha) (5), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (4), [W Byargeon](people/w-byargeon) (3).
